---
title: "Beginner Course on Microbial Genomics:<br>Applications & Research"
---

A bioinformatics workshop organised by the [Molecular Epidemiology Group](https://www.oucru.org/research/molecular-epidemiology) at Oxford University Clinical Research Unit in May, 2026.

This workshop is a part of the [KLEB-CASAVA](https://www.oucru.org/project/kleb-casava/) project, funded by the UKRI.

Aiming to enhance the local capacity in genomic epidemiology and surveillance, the workshop provides essential bioinformatics skills for Vietnamese clinicians and researchers, whose work focuses on bacterial infectious diseases, but have little to no experience in analysing whole-genome sequencing data. 

# Programme

::: panel-tabset
## Day 0
### Pack your backpack
[Slides]() | [Practical Guides](day-0/instructions/index.qmd) | [Data]()

**0.1 Commands & Environments**

**0.2 Setup your workspace**

## Day 1
### Meet the genomes
[Slides]() | [Practical Guides](day-1/instructions/index.qmd) | [Data]()

**1.1 Whole-genome sequencing - What? & Why?** 

**1.2 A complete genome - How it look like?** 

**1.3 Going backward - From raw sequencing data to assemblies** 

## Day 2
### Inspect the genomes
[Slides]() | [Practical Guides](day-2/instructions/index.qmd) | [Data]()

**2.1 Analyse the assemblies**

**2.2 Long-read sequencing & Hybrid assemblies**

**2.3 Locate & compare genes** 

## Day 3
### Phylogenetics - Relationships between genomes
[Slides]() | [Practical Guides](day-3/instructions/index.qmd) | [Data]()

**3.1 Read mapping & SNP alignment**

**3.2 Phylogenetic tree inference**

## Day 4
### Meta-genomes
[Slides]() | [Practical Guides](day-4/instructions/index.qmd) | [Data]()
:::

# Instructors

::: {layout-ncol=3}

::: {.organiser-card}
![](website-assets/images/DuyPT.png){.profile-pic}

**Dr. Pham Thanh Duy** <br>
*Head of Molecular Epidemiology Group* <br>
Center for Tropical Medicine and Global Health, Nuffield Department of Clinical Medicine, Oxford University

::: {.organiser-links}
[{{< fa globe >}}](https://your-site.com)
[{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://linkedin.com/in/username)
[{{< fa brands orcid >}}](https://orcid.org/0000-0000)
:::
:::

::: {.organiser-card}
![](website-assets/images/HaoCT.png){.profile-pic}

**Dr. Chung The Hao** <br>
*Senior Postdoc Fellow* <br>
Saw Swee Hock School of Public Health, National University of Singapore

::: {.organiser-links}

[{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/username)
[{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://linkedin.com/in/username)
[{{< fa brands orcid >}}](https://orcid.org/0000-0000)
:::
:::

::: {.organiser-card}
![](website-assets/images/NguyenMTS.png){.profile-pic}

**Mai Thu Si Nguyen** <br>
*Research Assistant* <br>
Oxford University Clinical Research Unit

::: {.organiser-links}

[{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/username)
[{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://linkedin.com/in/username)
[{{< fa brands orcid >}}](https://orcid.org/0000-0000)
:::
:::

::: {.organiser-card}
![](website-assets/images/QuynhNPN.png){.profile-pic}

**Nguyen Pham Nhu Quynh** <br>
*PhD Student* <br>
Center for Tropical Medicine and Global Health, Nuffield Department of Clinical Medicine, Oxford University

::: {.organiser-links}

[{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/username)
[{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://linkedin.com/in/username)
[{{< fa brands orcid >}}](https://orcid.org/0000-0000)
:::
:::

::: {.organiser-card}
![](website-assets/images/QuanTNM.png){.profile-pic}

**Ton Ngoc Minh Quan** <br>
*Research Assistant* <br>
Oxford University Clinical Research Unit

::: {.organiser-links}

[{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/username)
[{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://linkedin.com/in/username)
[{{< fa brands orcid >}}](https://orcid.org/0000-0000)
:::
:::

:::


# Acknowledgement

::: {.logo-flex-container}

::: {.funder-card}
![](website-assets/images/UKRI.png){}
:::

::: {.funder-card}
![](website-assets/images/wellcome-logo-black.png)
:::

::: {.funder-card}
![](website-assets/images/UOX-logo.jpg)
:::
:::
